PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-28-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janice Crosetti-Titmus for David Kuhner. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA).

The Court stated that the Inventory and Appraisal was filed yesterday and that it had received Ms. Crosetti-Titmus' declaration. Ms. Crosetti-Titmus requested additional time stating that the matter is in the tax court right now, that here was a trial date set in the tax court for 5/11/11, but that the date had been put over. Mr. Ferdon presented his concerns, addressd his issues with Ms. Crosetti-Titmus' declaration/status report noting that it is a very bare report, that it doesn't give dates, and that it doesn't outline the problems with the tax court. In addition, Mr. Ferdon stated that they did not know about the Trust, that it is not under the will, that he is aware that the Successor Trustees are the Sisters, that tomorrow is the hearing on the the petition for temporary appointment of a Conservator for one of the Sisters, that there are severe tax problems, that the SFPA can bring a petition to have someone removed when an estate is languishing, and that they first bring the problem to the Court's attention. Ms. Titmus-Crosetti stated that the only matter before the Court is the status report, that she spoke with Mr. Ferdon yesterday and gave him the info about the Trust verbally, that she is requesting the Court approve the status report, and then set a further review. In addition, she stated that there are 14 pieces of property in unusual states of mis-management and disrepair, and that she is investigating how things got so bad with an attorney and CPA involved. The Court stated that a lot of issues need to be addressed, and then set status on filing of the first account for 5/24/11; no appearance required if the account is on file. The Court also set 9/13/11 as a further status report on the administration of the estate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status - Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-29-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status - Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-16-2011 Continued To Mar-29-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janice Crosetti-Titmus for and with David Kuhner. Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator/Public Guardian.

Ms. Titmus stated that she has a status report for filing, that the inventory was prepared and sent to the Referee, and that the audit on the 706 Tax Certificate date was continued to May 16, 2011. Mr. Ferdon expressed his concerns and provided history. Mr. Kuhner stated that the majority of the assets were in the Trust for the two Sisters. The matter was continued to March 29, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
